content.body:
Covers Get/Set, Save/Load persistence, Reset, and the no-op case when
leoDir is empty. Verifies that a second scan with unchanged files
produces no new dependency drafts and that --refresh re-processes all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
